subtitles.original: Well, you might be wondering how I got here.
subtitles.english: Well, you might be wondering how I got here.

subtitles.original: It all started on my debut, one year ago.
subtitles.english: It all started on my debut, one year ago.

subtitles.original: Hmm, hmm, hmm...
subtitles.english: Hmm, hmm, hmm...

subtitles.original: Ah!
subtitles.english: Ah!

subtitles.original: Ouch... Ah...
subtitles.english: Ouch... Ah...

subtitles.original: Wait, wait, wait, wait... are you going to play your entire debut video?
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, wait, wait... are you going to play your entire debut video?

subtitles.original: No, but I have a three-hour video essay prepared.
subtitles.english: No, but I have a three-hour video essay prepared.

subtitles.original: But no, you don't have time or budget for that.
subtitles.english: But no, you don't have time or budget for that.

subtitles.original: What?
subtitles.english: What?

subtitles.original: Let me fix this.
subtitles.english: Let me fix this.

subtitles.original: Kronii, no!
subtitles.english: Kronii, no!

subtitles.original: Ah, oh man, I wish I had 3D.
subtitles.english: Ah, oh man, I wish I had 3D.

subtitles.original: Oh? Oh?
subtitles.english: Oh? Oh?

subtitles.original: Huh?
subtitles.english: Huh?

subtitles.original: Aah!
subtitles.english: Aah!

subtitles.original: get flashbanged haha
subtitles.english: get flashbanged haha

subtitles.original: Spin to win!
subtitles.english: Spin to win!

subtitles.original: Ah, my ankles...
subtitles.english: Ah, my ankles...

subtitles.original: Ah, my ankle!
subtitles.english: Ah, my ankle!

subtitles.original: Hello everyone, it's me, Cecilia Immergreen from Hololive Justice!
subtitles.english: Hello everyone, it's me, Cecilia Immergreen from Hololive Justice!

subtitles.original: Spin to win! Yay, I'm 3D!
subtitles.english: Spin to win! Yay, I'm 3D!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I'm so nervous, I'm so excited!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I'm so nervous, I'm so excited!

subtitles.original: Hi everyone! Hello tous, hello everyone in chat! Hello, hello!
subtitles.english: Hi everyone! Hello tous, hello everyone in chat! Hello, hello!

subtitles.original: It's me, and I was just born out of this egg.
subtitles.english: It's me, and I was just born out of this egg.

subtitles.original: Non-canon, by the way.
subtitles.english: Non-canon, by the way.

subtitles.original: Today we'll be going on a beautiful adventure...
subtitles.english: Today we'll be going on a beautiful adventure...

subtitles.original: ...and maybe having some guests.
subtitles.english: ...and maybe having some guests.

subtitles.original: And actually, our very first guest is right here on my shoulder.
subtitles.english: And actually, our very first guest is right here on my shoulder.

subtitles.original: Who could it be? It's Ototori! Yay!
subtitles.english: Who could it be? It's Ototori! Yay!

subtitles.original: Oh, he's so cute!
subtitles.english: Oh, he's so cute!

subtitles.original: Yeah, this is our very first guest today. I wonder who else is going to come today.
subtitles.english: Yeah, this is our very first guest today. I wonder who else is going to come today.

subtitles.original: Maybe, maybe some people?
subtitles.english: Maybe, maybe some people?

subtitles.original: But Otomo, what are you doing? Wait, you're so cute!
subtitles.english: But Otomo, what are you doing? Wait, you're so cute!

subtitles.original: What do you want, Otomo? Huh? What is it?
subtitles.english: What do you want, Otomo? Huh? What is it?

subtitles.original: Uh, can I say no?
subtitles.english: Uh, can I say no?

subtitles.original: Wow, okay...
subtitles.english: Wow, okay...

subtitles.original: So Otomo has just said... I don't know if you can understand him, he has a very weird dialect.
subtitles.english: So Otomo has just said... I don't know if you can understand him, he has a very weird dialect.

subtitles.original: But he just said that since it's been a year since I crashed that car, we're supposed to learn how to drive.
subtitles.english: But he just said that since it's been a year since I crashed that car, we're supposed to learn how to drive.

subtitles.original: Do you guys want to go learn how to drive? Huh? Should we do it?
subtitles.english: Do you guys want to go learn how to drive? Huh? Should we do it?

subtitles.original: I guess we should do it, Otomo. Okay.
subtitles.english: I guess we should do it, Otomo. Okay.

subtitles.original: I think... I wonder what we should be doing next.
subtitles.english: I think... I wonder what we should be doing next.

subtitles.original: Okay, let's see, guys. Here are options. Please vote in chat!
subtitles.english: Okay, let's see, guys. Here are options. Please vote in chat!

subtitles.original:
a) find a driving teacher
b) ask otomo what to do next
subtitles.english:
a) find a driving teacher
b) ask otomo what to do next

subtitles.original: First, find a driving teacher,
subtitles.english: First, find a driving teacher,

subtitles.original: or ask Otomo what to do next. Maybe he has a better idea.
subtitles.english: or ask Otomo what to do next. Maybe he has a better idea.

subtitles.original: I'm thinking, I'm thinking. But yeah, while we're waiting for the poll to end,
subtitles.english: I'm thinking, I'm thinking. But yeah, while we're waiting for the poll to end,

subtitles.original: maybe I can show off a little bit. This is what I look like!
subtitles.english: maybe I can show off a little bit. This is what I look like!

subtitles.original: Finally, you can see me from the back!
subtitles.english: Finally, you can see me from the back!

subtitles.original: Ah, this is my bow, my pretty bow! Yay!
subtitles.english: Ah, this is my bow, my pretty bow! Yay!

subtitles.original: Okay, A, B... no, you don't have to type it into chat, you're going to have to put it into the poll.
subtitles.english: Okay, A, B... no, you don't have to type it into chat, you're going to have to put it into the poll.

subtitles.original: Okay, is the poll good? Shall we see? Oh, not yet.
subtitles.english: Okay, is the poll good? Shall we see? Oh, not yet.

subtitles.original: Okay, yeah, the bow, and then if you look closely you can see that everything reflects...
subtitles.english: Okay, yeah, the bow, and then if you look closely you can see that everything reflects...

subtitles.original: ...everything that's made out of metal.
subtitles.english: ...everything that's made out of metal.

subtitles.original: And Ototori is here too, of course, not forgotten. Never forgotten!
subtitles.english: And Ototori is here too, of course, not forgotten. Never forgotten!

subtitles.original: And Otomo is very cute.
subtitles.english: And Otomo is very cute.

subtitles.original: Oh, the poll is over, it's done! Okay, which one won?
subtitles.english: Oh, the poll is over, it's done! Okay, which one won?

subtitles.original: A! Find a driving teacher. Okay!
subtitles.english: A! Find a driving teacher. Okay!

subtitles.original: I think I know exactly where to go.
subtitles.english: I think I know exactly where to go.

subtitles.original: Wait, but I forgot, if we're going to drive, I'm going to have to take off the skirt...
subtitles.english: Wait, but I forgot, if we're going to drive, I'm going to have to take off the skirt...

subtitles.original: ...because it's very stiff and I can't sit in it.
subtitles.english: ...because it's very stiff and I can't sit in it.

subtitles.original: Let's do that real quick.
subtitles.english: Let's do that real quick.

subtitles.original: Excuse you, back off, Otomo, back off!
subtitles.english: Excuse you, back off, Otomo, back off!

subtitles.original: Ta-da!
subtitles.english: Ta-da!

subtitles.original: This is what I look like without the skirt on!
subtitles.english: This is what I look like without the skirt on!
